chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 918 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2020 None present. = This petition is called for hearing. None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation received. The conduct on the part of petitioner shows that either the purpose for which instant petition was filed has been served or the petitioner has lost his interest in this petition, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE S
